description: surge-quality operator dashboard. Per-day Surge share, per-day average combined quality score (rubric 0-10 + telemetry contribution), topic-area breakdown, and low-score replay. Backed by the surge_quality Postgres schema on the shared surge_brain DB (uid=surge_quality_pg). Mirrors the Jinja2 fallback dashboard served by the service at /v1/quality/dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM surge_quality.rubric_scores rs JOIN surge_quality.responses r ON r.id = rs.response_id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days';
SELECT AVG(rs.composite) AS value FROM surge_quality.rubric_scores rs JOIN surge_quality.responses r ON r.id = rs.response_id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days';

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN composite < 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)) AS value FROM surge_quality.rubric_scores rs JOIN surge_quality.responses r ON r.id = rs.response_id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM surge_quality.routing_decisions WHERE decision = 'claude_primary' AND decided_at >= now() - interval '14 days';

panels.title: Per-day Surge share (% of scored responses)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', r.generated_at) AS time, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.model_used ILIKE '%claude%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS "surge %", 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.model_used ILIKE '%claude%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS "claude %" FROM surge_quality.responses r JOIN surge_quality.rubric_scores rs ON rs.response_id = r.id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('day', r.generated_at) AS time, AVG(rs.composite) AS "avg composite" FROM surge_quality.responses r JOIN surge_quality.rubric_scores rs ON rs.response_id = r.id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

WITH per_response AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', r.generated_at) AS day, rs.composite, (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN ts.signal_type = 'thumbs_up' THEN 1.0 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'thumbs_down' THEN -1.0 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'dropoff' THEN -0.5 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'reask' THEN -0.5 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'human_escalation_request' THEN -1.0 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'reply_time_seconds' AND ts.value <= 30 THEN 0.3 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'reply_time_seconds' AND ts.value <= 90 THEN 0.0 WHEN ts.signal_type = 'reply_time_seconds' THEN -0.3 ELSE NULL END) FROM surge_quality.telemetry_signals ts WHERE ts.response_id = r.id) AS telem_raw FROM surge_quality.responses r JOIN surge_quality.rubric_scores rs ON rs.response_id = r.id WHERE r.generated_at >= now() - interval '14 days') SELECT day AS time, 0.7 * AVG(composite)/10.0 + 0.3 * COALESCE((GREATEST(LEAST(AVG(telem_raw), 1.0), -1.0) + 1.0)/2.0, 0.5) AS "combined" FROM per_response GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(rd.factors_json->>'topic', '(unclassified)') AS topic, COUNT(*) AS turns FROM surge_quality.routing_decisions rd WHERE rd.decided_at >= now() - interval '14 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY turns DESC LIMIT 12;

SELECT r.id AS response_id, r.conversation_id, ROUND(rs.composite::numeric, 2) AS composite, r.model_used, r.generated_at, LEFT(r.response_text, 160) AS snippet FROM surge_quality.responses r JOIN surge_quality.rubric_scores rs ON rs.response_id = r.id WHERE rs.composite < 5.0 ORDER BY r.generated_at DESC LIMIT 25;

title: Surge — Quality Recommender
